title: agropyron glaucum var. virescens
intro: Agropyron glaucum var. virescens, also known as green false brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Agropyron glaucum var. virescens include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and aid in the treatment of coughs and colds. Agropyron glaucum var. virescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
